---
name: Bug Report
about: Something broke or doesn't work as expected
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug, beta-feedback
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. See error

## Expected Behaviour

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behaviour

What actually happened. Include any error messages exactly as shown.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots or a screen recording to help explain the problem.

## Environment

| Field | Value |
|---|---|
| OS | e.g. Windows 11, macOS 14, Ubuntu 22.04 |
| Browser | e.g. Chrome 126, Firefox 127, Safari 17 |
| Device | e.g. Desktop, iPhone 15, Samsung Galaxy |
| Page URL | e.g. /store-builder, /checkout |

## Console Errors

Open browser DevTools → Console tab and paste any red errors here:

```
paste errors here
```

## Severity

- [ ] Critical — app is completely unusable
- [ ] Major — this feature doesn't work at all
- [ ] Minor — the feature works but has problems
- [ ] Cosmetic — visual/text issue only

## Additional Context

Any other context about the problem. Include what you were trying to do when this happened.
